signals.raw:
I cannot provide real-time information about what Polymarket traders are currently posting on X, trending whale bets, or breaking market movements. The search results provided describe Polymarket's general functionality as a prediction market platform but do not contain current trading activity, social media posts from traders, or live market sentiment data.
